title: iPhone OS 1 - iPhone OS 2
desc: Apple's first mobile operating system wallpaper features a deep Earth and starry sky theme, symbolizing the infinite possibilities of technology and the universe. This classic wallpaper primarily uses deep blue tones, complemented by the elegant curves of Earth's arc, embodying Apple's 'Think Different' design philosophy. As Jony Ive said: 'Simplicity is not about deleting, but refining.' This wallpaper perfectly interprets the starting point of Apple's minimalist aesthetics.

title: iPhone OS 1
desc: The revolutionary iPhone OS 1 native wallpaper from 2007 features cosmic starscapes and Earth's silhouette as its visual core. The deep blue-black gradient creates an infinite sense of space, symbolizing Apple's ambition to pioneer a new era of smartphones. This wallpaper employs soft halo effects, showcasing Apple's ultimate pursuit of detail, becoming a milestone in mobile device wallpaper design.

title: iPhone OS 2
desc: iPhone OS 2 continues the cosmic theme wallpaper design from the original, presented with a more refined Earth perspective. The wallpaper uses classic deep space blue with starlight accents, and layered lighting treatment reflects Apple's control over visual depth. This design validates design master Dieter Rams' philosophy: 'Good design is long-lasting,' still treasured by Apple fans today.

title: iPhone OS 3
desc: iPhone OS 3 wallpaper marks the maturity of Apple's visual language, continuing the deep space theme while adding richer color layers. Gradient blue-purple tones and subtle starlight effects create a visual experience that is both mysterious and warm. Apple's design team demonstrates through careful color balance that tech products can also convey human warmth.

title: OS 3
desc: The OS 3 era wallpaper design bridges past and future, maintaining cosmic theme unity while enhancing visual quality through more delicate gradient processing. Deep blue base tones paired with faintly visible nebula effects embody Apple's 'less is more' design philosophy. This wallpaper laid the aesthetic foundation for subsequent iOS design language evolution.

title: iOS 4
desc: iOS 4 introduced a new water droplet dew wallpaper design, showcasing natural beauty through exquisite macro photography style. Crystal-clear water droplets sparkle on a dark background, symbolizing the arrival of the Retina display era. This wallpaper embodies Apple's design philosophy of fusing natural elements with high technology, as Steve Jobs said: 'Design is not just what it looks like, design is how it works.'

title: iOS 5
desc: iOS 5 wallpaper is renowned for its linen texture and delicate lighting effects, pioneering the peak of skeuomorphic design. Warm neutral tones and refined material feel give the digital interface tactile warmth. This wallpaper reflects Apple's tribute to real-world textures, praised by design critics as 'a perfect fusion of digital and physical worlds.'

title: iOS 6
desc: iOS 6 wallpaper continues the skeuomorphic aesthetic of linen and leather textures, creating visual depth through delicate textures and perfectly balanced lighting. Classic blue water droplets and linen backgrounds became visual symbols of this era. Apple's design team created both familiar and novel user experiences through meticulous material recreation, representing the highest achievement of skeuomorphic design.

title: iOS 7
desc: iOS 7 wallpaper marks a revolutionary transformation in Apple's design language. The flat design led by Jony Ive redefined mobile aesthetics with colorful waves and dreamy gradients. Bold color collisions, flowing curves, and translucent layers created unprecedented visual impact. This wallpaper was rated by Wallpaper* magazine as 'a milestone that changed digital design history.'

title: iOS 8
desc: iOS 8 wallpaper continues iOS 7's flat aesthetic, featuring more mature color harmonization and elegant gradient transitions. Dreamy purple-blue tones and soft halo effects create a serene yet profound visual atmosphere. Apple demonstrates through this wallpaper that flat design can also possess rich emotional expression.

title: iOS 9
desc: iOS 9 wallpaper features abstract colorful feathers and flowing color waves, showcasing Apple's exploration of organic form aesthetics. Rich color layers and soft edge treatment create a visual effect that is both lively and elegant. This wallpaper embodies Apple's design philosophy of 'bringing technology back to humanity,' beloved by users worldwide.

title: iOS 10
desc: iOS 10 wallpaper uses abstract light and color flow as its core visual language, boldly employing high-saturation gradient colors. Dynamic lighting effects and layered colors symbolize iOS's increasingly rich functional ecosystem. This design is considered Apple's important attempt at exploring 'emotional interfaces,' perfectly balancing vitality and elegance.

title: iOS 11
desc: iOS 11 wallpaper returns to natural themes, using exquisite fluid art and abstract colors as its design language. Flowing colorful ink effects create watercolor-like visual beauty, reflecting the fusion of digital art and traditional aesthetics. As Apple's VP of Design Alan Dye stated: 'We pursue designs that can touch people's hearts.'

title: iOS 12
desc: iOS 12 wallpaper features brilliant spectrum gradients and abstract geometric forms, showcasing Apple's deep exploration of color science. From deep blue-purple to bright orange-red, smooth color transitions demonstrate OLED screens' ultimate expressiveness. This wallpaper is hailed by the design community as 'a masterpiece that turns screens into art canvases.'

title: iOS 13
desc: iOS 13 wallpaper first introduced dark mode design, redefining nighttime aesthetics with deep dark tones and refined lighting effects. Elegant deep blue with subtle color accents perfectly adapts to OLED screen display characteristics. Apple demonstrates through this wallpaper that dark design can be equally elegant and layered, becoming the industry benchmark for dark mode design.

title: iOS 14
desc: iOS 14 wallpaper features soft gradient colors and abstract geometric shapes, reflecting Apple's visual adaptation thinking for the widget era. Warm tones and balanced composition provide perfect visual backgrounds for various widgets. This wallpaper demonstrates Apple's 'form follows function' design philosophy, achieving exquisite balance between aesthetics and practicality.

title: iOS 14.2
desc: iOS 14.2 new wallpapers feature rich artistic expression, introducing multiple unique designs created by artists. From abstract geometry to natural landscapes, diverse visual styles reflect Apple's emphasis on personalized expression. These wallpapers are called by design critics 'a breakthrough that turns iPhone into a personal art gallery.'

title: iOS 15
desc: iOS 15 wallpaper features dreamy clouds and soft skies, creating a serene and peaceful visual atmosphere. Gradient blue-pink tones and faintly visible clouds reflect Apple's digital interpretation of natural imagery. This wallpaper perfectly demonstrates Apple's philosophy that 'technology serves people,' letting users feel a moment of tranquility with every unlock.

title: iOS 16
desc: iOS 16 wallpaper features magnificent astronomical landscapes and deep cosmic themes, carefully designed to complement the new lock screen customization features. From brilliant nebulae to serene Earth views, each wallpaper is meticulously composed to work with depth effects. This design is described by Apple's design team as 'making every iPhone a unique piece of art.'

title: iOS 17
desc: iOS 17 wallpaper features dynamic colors and refined lighting effects, perfectly adapted for StandBy display. From abstract color flows to elegant geometric patterns, each wallpaper reflects Apple's deep thinking about Always-On Display. This design demonstrates Apple's exceptional ability to seamlessly fuse functionality and aesthetics.

title: iOS 18
desc: iOS 18 wallpaper uses deep dark tones and refined gradient effects as its design language, perfectly complementing the new customization features. Rich color options and dynamic effects let users create unique visual experiences. This wallpaper is considered Apple's latest interpretation of 'personalized minimalism,' achieving perfect balance between unity and diversity.

title: iOS 18.3
desc: iOS 18.3 wallpaper continues iOS 18's design language, highlighting richer color variants and refined detail processing. Optimized dynamic effects and dark mode adaptation showcase Apple's continuous refinement attitude. This wallpaper embodies Apple's brand spirit of 'the pursuit of perfection never ends.'

title: iOS 26
desc: iOS 26 wallpaper represents Apple's latest visual design language, fusing liquid glass effects with cutting-edge dynamic lighting aesthetics. This wallpaper features flowing translucent layers and refined light refraction, perfectly showcasing the next-generation iOS design innovation. Hailed by design critics as 'the culmination of Apple's decade-long flat design evolution,' it defines new standards for mobile interface aesthetics.
